Class EconomyRepository

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.economy.db.repositories.EconomyRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEconomyRepository
public class EconomyRepository extends Object implements IEconomyRepository
Repository implementation for economy balances using JDBI.

Wraps blocking database calls in CompletableFuture on the shared database thread pool. Compound operations run inside a single transaction so they commit or roll back as a unit.

    Description

    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    deposit(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
    Atomically adds an amount to a player's balance, creating the account if needed.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    ensureAccount(UUID uuid, BigDecimal starting)
    Ensures an account row exists for the player, creating it with the given starting balance if absent.
    CompletableFuture<BigDecimal>
    getBalance(UUID uuid)
    Reads a player's current balance.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    set(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
    Overwrites a player's balance with an exact value (administrative use).
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    transfer(UUID from, UUID to, BigDecimal amount)
    Atomically moves an amount from one player to another inside a single transaction.
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    withdraw(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
    Atomically subtracts an amount from a player's balance, but only if the balance is sufficient.

  • Constructor Details

    • EconomyRepository

      public EconomyRepository(org.jdbi.v3.core.Jdbi jdbi, ExecutorService executor)
      Constructs a new EconomyRepository.
      Parameters:
      jdbi - the JDBI instance for database access
      executor - the executor service for async operations

  • Method Details

    • getBalance

      public CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> getBalance(UUID uuid)
      Description copied from interface: IEconomyRepository
      Reads a player's current balance.
      Specified by:
      getBalance in interface IEconomyRepository
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of the balance, or BigDecimal.ZERO if no account row exists yet

    • ensureAccount

      public CompletableFuture<Void> ensureAccount(UUID uuid, BigDecimal starting)
      Description copied from interface: IEconomyRepository
      Ensures an account row exists for the player, creating it with the given starting balance if absent. A no-op if the row already exists.
      Specified by:
      ensureAccount in interface IEconomyRepository
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      starting - the starting balance to seed a new account with
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is guaranteed to exist

    • deposit

      public CompletableFuture<Void> deposit(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: IEconomyRepository
      Atomically adds an amount to a player's balance, creating the account if needed.
      Specified by:
      deposit in interface IEconomyRepository
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - the (positive) amount to add
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the credit is applied

    • withdraw

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> withdraw(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: IEconomyRepository
      Atomically subtracts an amount from a player's balance, but only if the balance is sufficient. The check and the debit happen in a single SQL statement, so two concurrent withdrawals cannot both succeed and overdraw.
      Specified by:
      withdraw in interface IEconomyRepository
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - the (positive) amount to remove
      Returns:
      a future of true if the debit succeeded, false if funds were insufficient

    • set

      public CompletableFuture<Void> set(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: IEconomyRepository
      Overwrites a player's balance with an exact value (administrative use).
      Specified by:
      set in interface IEconomyRepository
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - the new balance
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the balance is set

    • transfer

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> transfer(UUID from, UUID to, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: IEconomyRepository
      Atomically moves an amount from one player to another inside a single transaction. Either both sides apply or neither does.
      Specified by:
      transfer in interface IEconomyRepository
      Parameters:
      from - the paying player's UUID
      to - the receiving player's UUID
      amount - the (positive) amount to move
      Returns:
      a future of true if the transfer succeeded, false if the payer had insufficient funds
